wine_experiences.name: Pago de Carraovejas 6 Senses Immersive Experience
wine_experiences.address: Camino de Carraovejas s/n, 47300 Penafiel, Valladolid, Spain
wine_experiences.experience_type: Immersive winery and terroir sensory journey
wine_experiences.description: The flagship wine experience of Ribera del Duero. Six stages take guests from vine to glass across the Pago de Carraovejas estate: vineyard walk, cellar architecture tour, fermentation hall, barrel room, sensory analysis and final tasting paired with Michelin-starred Ambivium dishes. The Grand Crus of Alma extended format adds single-pago vertical comparative tastings.

verified.address_quoted: Camino de Carraovejas, s/n, 47300 Penafiel, Valladolid, Espana

wine_experiences.name: Finca Villacreces Estate E-Bike and Vineyard Experience
wine_experiences.address: Carretera Soria (N-122) Km. 322, 47350 Quintanilla de Onesimo, Valladolid, Spain
wine_experiences.experience_type: E-bike estate tour and organic vineyard exploration
wine_experiences.description: Electric bike tour of the 115-hectare Finca Villacreces estate in organic viticulture, set between the Duero river and bicentennial pines adjacent to Vega Sicilia. The 4.5 km circuit discovers terroir contrasts across the estate; ends with tasting of Pruno and Finca Villacreces wines on the terrace. A picnic-in-the-vineyard option is available by arrangement.

verified.address_quoted: Carretera Soria (N-122) Km. 322, 47350 Quintanilla de Onesimo, Valladolid, Espana

wine_experiences.name: Ribiertete Underground Cellar and Escape Room Experience
wine_experiences.address: C/ Cascajar 4, 09400 Aranda de Duero, Burgos, Spain
wine_experiences.experience_type: Underground cave museum tour with wine escape room
wine_experiences.description: Unique combination of wine museum, underground medieval cave exploration and wine-themed escape room at Ribiertete in Aranda de Duero. Seven kilometres of 13th-century subterranean galleries house the winemaking history of Ribera del Duero; the escape room is set within the bodega. Guided in Spanish and English. The only underground wine museum in Europe.

verified.address_quoted: C/ Cascajar n 4, 09400 Aranda de Duero, Spain

wine_experiences.name: Bodegas Emilio Moro Harvest and Gastronomic Experience
wine_experiences.address: Ctra. Penafiel-Vitoria s/n, 47315 Pesquera de Duero, Valladolid, Spain
wine_experiences.experience_type: Harvest participation and gastronomic wine pairing
wine_experiences.description: Full-day harvest season experience at Bodegas Emilio Moro on the Golden Mile. Guests participate in picking, sorting and grape selection before a full gastronomic experience with roast lechazo suckling lamb from the Burgos region, each course paired with wines from the Emilio Moro range by the winemaking team.

verified.address_quoted: Ctra. Penafiel-Vitoria, S/N, 47315 Pesquera de Duero, Valladolid

wine_experiences.name: Arzuaga Vineyard Walk and Deer Reserve Experience
wine_experiences.address: Carretera N-122 Km 325, 47350 Quintanilla de Onesimo, Valladolid, Spain
wine_experiences.experience_type: Estate vineyard walk, wildlife reserve and wine tasting
wine_experiences.description: Distinctive Arzuaga estate experience combining a vineyard walk across the Golden Mile vines with a visit to the Finca La Planta deer reserve (home to deer, mouflon and wild boar), followed by a structured tasting of the Arzuaga range with cheese and charcuterie. A wine-plus-wildlife experience unique to this estate.

verified.address_quoted: Carretera N-122, 325, 47350 Quintanilla de Onesimo, Valladolid

wine_experiences.name: Bodegas Legaris Barrel to Senses Blending Workshop
wine_experiences.address: Ctra. Penafiel-Encinas de Esgueva Km. 2,5, Curiel de Duero, Valladolid, Spain
wine_experiences.experience_type: Blending workshop with barrel comparative tasting
wine_experiences.description: Hands-on blending experience at Bodegas Legaris. Guests taste individual-barrel samples of Tempranillo from different parcels and oak types, then blend their own Reserva-style wine with guidance from the winemaking team. Theoretical explanation of barrel influence; available for groups of 6-30 Monday to Saturday.

verified.address_quoted: Ctra. Penafiel-Encinas de Esgueva, Km. 2,5, Curiel de Duero, Valladolid

wine_experiences.name: Abadia Retuerta Harvest and Pago Exploration Experience
wine_experiences.address: Monasterio de Santa Maria, 122 Km. 332.5, 47340 Sardon de Duero, Valladolid, Spain
wine_experiences.experience_type: Harvest participation and experimental pago barrel tasting
wine_experiences.description: At Abadia Retuerta LeDomaine, harvest season brings guests into the picking and selection process across the estate's various pago vineyards. The post-harvest tasting in the experimental barrel hall explores single-pago vinifications side by side; accompanied by Refectorio culinary preparation. Exclusive small-group format in the 12th-century abbey setting.

wine_experiences.name: Castilla Termal Wine and Spa Monastic Package
wine_experiences.address: San Bernardo s/n, 47359 Valbuena de Duero, Valladolid, Spain
wine_experiences.experience_type: Wine tasting and vinotherapy spa retreat in a 12th-century monastery
wine_experiences.description: The Converso Experience package at Castilla Termal Monasterio de Valbuena combines accommodation, breakfast, thermal spa access, the Converso tasting (the hotel's own Tempranillo wine) and visits to nearby DO Ribera del Duero wineries. The 12th-century Gothic cloister and frescoed chapel provide an unmatched monastic backdrop for wine and wellness.

verified.address_quoted: San Bernardo, Valbuena de Duero, Valladolid

wine_experiences.name: Penafiel Castle Wine Tasting in the Provincial Wine Museum
wine_experiences.address: Museo del Vino, Castillo de Penafiel, 47300 Penafiel, Valladolid, Spain
wine_experiences.experience_type: Guided museum tour and structured DO Ribera del Duero tasting
wine_experiences.description: Guided tour of the 15th-century Penafiel Castle and the Provincial Wine Museum, concluding in the ground-floor tasting room with a guided sampling of DO Ribera del Duero wines. Three valleys visible from the castle battlements; the museum context enriches the wine tasting with viticultural history. Free weekend shuttle from the town centre.

verified.address_quoted: Museo del Vino, 47300 Penafiel, Valladolid, Spain

wine_experiences.name: Lechazo Asado and Ribera del Duero Wine Pairing Lunch
wine_experiences.address: C/ Isilla 14, 09400 Aranda de Duero, Burgos, Spain
wine_experiences.experience_type: Traditional lechazo roast and DO Ribera del Duero wine pairing experience
wine_experiences.description: Roast suckling lamb (lechazo asado) from IGP Lechazo de Castilla y Leon, cooked in a wood-fired oven at Asador Casa Florencio in Aranda de Duero. Paired with a structured flight of DO Ribera del Duero Crianza and Reserva wines. Castilian roast lamb with local Tempranillo is the classic regional pairing.

verified.address_quoted: C/ Isilla 14, 09400 Aranda de Duero, BURGOS
